questionHtml: When calculating the ranks, Chester incorrectly read the Netherlands’ score as 478. Explain why the value of the Spearman’s rank correlation rs does not change despite this error.
markschemeHtml:
lowering the top score by 20 does not change its rank so rs is unchanged       R1


Note: Accept “this would not alter the rank” or “Netherlands still top rank” or similar. Condone any statement that clearly implies the ranks have not changed, for example: “The Netherlands still has the highest score.”

 

[1 mark]

meta.title: When calculating the ranks, Chester incorrectly read the Netherlands’ score as 478. Explain why the value of the Spearman’s rank correlation rs does not change despite this error.
